title: GameSync Theme
description: A single color theme for the GameSync desktop app.

name.description: Human-readable theme name shown in GameSync.

colors.description: Theme color roles. All values are #rrggbb hex.

panel-2.description: Raised panel background. Defaults to panel.

accent-hover.description: Accent hover state. Defaults to accent.

effects.description: Optional surface-styling hints. They drive the look of the gallery preview (frosted glass, soft neumorphism, skeuomorphic material). The GameSync app renders the flat `colors`; it ignores this block until it adds support for it, so a theme is fully usable with `colors` alone.

gradient.description: Backdrop (glass) or surface (skeuo) gradient stops, top→bottom.

blur.description: Frost/softness radius in px. Glass backdrop blur, or neo/skeuo shadow softness.

opacity.description: Panel translucency for glass surfaces (0 = clear, 1 = solid).

highlight.description: Light edge: glass rim light, neo top-left shadow, skeuo top gloss.

shadow.description: Dark edge: drop shadow, neo bottom-right shadow, skeuo base shade.

glow.description: Optional accent glow around the primary button.
